text: Written terminal learning objectives in ABCD format (Audience, Behavior, Condition, Degree)
Written enabling objectives for each terminal objective
Mapped each objective to the appropriate Bloom's Taxonomy level
Confirmed objectives address the performance gap identified in Analysis
Selected instructional strategies appropriate to each Bloom's level
Defined the content sequence (logical, task-based, or spiral)
Designed the assessment strategy (pre-test, knowledge checks, final assessment, performance task)
Mapped each assessment item to a specific learning objective
Chosen delivery format and media (e-learning, ILT, VILT, blended, job aid)
Produced a course outline or storyboard structure
Completed and shared the Design Document with stakeholders
Obtained SME and stakeholder sign-off on the design document
